story.iWant: to enable Anthropic explicit caching với cache_control directives
story.soThat: Claude users có thể benefit từ 20-30% cost reduction cho cached tokens

task.title: Add cache_control directives for Claude models

subtasks.subtask: Review Anthropic caching documentation và cache_control format
Identify Claude models trong system (claude-haiku-4-5, claude-sonnet-4-5, etc.)
Add cache_control directives to system messages for Claude models
Verify cache_control format matches Anthropic requirements
Test cache_control với sample Claude API calls
Integration test với actual Claude API calls
Set default cache TTL to 5 minutes (300 seconds)
Make TTL configurable via environment variable (up to 1 hour)
Document TTL configuration và best practices
Test cache expiration với different TTL values
Log cache token metrics (creation, read, total cached tokens)
Calculate cache hit rate based on token metrics
Test token tracking với sample Claude calls
Add cache metrics to monitoring dashboard
Test metrics logging với sample requests

acceptanceCriteria.ac: `cache_control` directives được add cho Claude models trong LLM calls
Cache TTL được configured (default 5 minutes, configurable to 1 hour)
Cache creation/read tokens được tracked trong response usage
Cache metrics được logged và reported
No quality degradation (cached computation = same result)

doc.title: ChainLens AI Worker - Epic Breakdown: LLM Optimization
doc.snippet: Story 1.3 defines requirements for enabling Anthropic explicit caching. Expected savings: $3-6/month with zero quality impact. Effort: 1 hour. Prerequisites: Story 1.2.

doc.title: ChainLens AI Worker - Master Optimization Plan v1.1
doc.section: Phase 1: Quality-Preserving Quick Wins - Task 1.3: Anthropic Explicit Caching
doc.snippet: Anthropic explicit caching requires cache_control directives in messages. Cache TTL: Default 5 minutes, configurable to 1 hour. Cache creation/read tokens tracked in response usage.

doc.title: Research Prompt: System Prompt Optimization
doc.section: 5. Prompt Caching Implementation - 5.2 Anthropic Claude Caching
doc.snippet: Anthropic provides explicit prompt caching với cache control directives. Cost reduction: Up to 90% for cached tokens. Latency reduction: Up to 85%. TTL: 5 minutes default, configurable to 1 hour.

file.reason: Primary method to modify for adding cache_control directives to Claude models. Need to detect Claude models và add cache_control to system messages.

Reference implementation for adding cache_control directives. Shows format: {"type": "text", "text": content, "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}}. Can reference pattern but this story focuses on explicit cache_control in LLM calls.
Advanced Anthropic caching implementation với token-based caching strategy. Can reference for patterns but this story focuses on explicit cache_control directives.
Configuration management. Can add cache TTL configuration here if needed. Environment variables are loaded here.

constraint.description: Zero quality impact required. Cached computation = same result (100% similarity).
Dual-mode architecture: Original mode (baseline) + Optimized mode (with caching). Feature flags allow switching and rollback.
Cache control directives must be in format: {"type": "text", "text": content, "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}}. Only applies to Claude models (anthropic/*).
Default TTL: 5 minutes (300 seconds). Must be configurable via environment variable (up to 1 hour). Document configuration and best practices.
Anthropic response usage includes cache_creation_input_tokens và cache_read_input_tokens. Must extract và track these metrics.
Must not break existing LLM calls. Caching should be transparent to callers. Test with existing agent configurations.

interface.name: make_llm_api_call()
interface.signature: async def make_llm_api_call(messages: List[Dict[str, Any]], model_name: str, ...) -> Union[Dict[str, Any], AsyncGenerator, ModelResponse]

tests.standards: Testing standards include: Quality validation (100% similarity check for cached computation), Performance testing (cache hit rate based on token metrics, cost savings, latency), Integration testing (existing LLM calls, different Claude models, agent configurations, cache expiration). Use semantic similarity checking for quality validation. A/B testing framework for comparing original vs optimized modes.

test.idea: Unit test: Verify cache_control directive generation for Claude models
Integration test: Test cache_control với actual Claude API calls
Unit test: Verify TTL configuration (default 5 minutes, configurable to 1 hour)
Integration test: Test cache expiration với different TTL values
Unit test: Extract cache_creation_input_tokens và cache_read_input_tokens từ Anthropic response usage
Integration test: Verify token tracking với sample Claude calls
Unit test: Verify cache metrics are logged và reported
Integration test: Verify cache metrics appear in monitoring dashboard
Automated test: Compare cached vs non-cached responses (target: 100% similarity)
A/B test: Run same queries with original and optimized modes, compare quality metrics
